title: TUM_WinterLab_TERT-HNSCC_ddPCR
author: Winter, Christof
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The provided dataset contains raw digital droplet PCR (ddPCR) amplitude and cluster data for all analyzed samples. Each file corresponds to a specific ddPCR plate, with file names and folder structures reflecting the standardized plate identifiers used in the associated S4 patient dataset. 
 Sample coordinates and identifiers from the S4 patient ddPCR results, clinical data, and cohort metadata can be mapped directly to the plate information found in this raw data collection. This enables comprehensive integration of raw molecular measurements with clinical parameters.
